definition.name: God-of-the-Gaps
definition.premise: An intellectual fallacy where God is invoked solely to explain phenomena that science cannot yet explain (the gaps in human knowledge).
definition.danger: As scientific knowledge advances (e.g., discovering the mechanism of lightning), the "gaps" shrink, and God is continuously evicted from the universe, rendering theology obsolete.
definition.secular_application_to_qm: Secular physicists accuse any theological interpretation of wave function collapse as a "God-of-the-Gaps" argument, assuming that a deterministic hidden variable or multi-verse math will eventually solve the measurement problem and evict God.

concept.name: God-is-the-Gap
concept.core_thesis: The probabilistic boundary of Quantum Mechanics is not a gap in human *knowledge* waiting to be solved; it is a structural boundary in *Creation* logically designed by Ultimate Reality (UR).

proof.description: Classical physics describes God's 'habits of providence' (Render_BY)—the predictable rules required for humans to live. Quantum Mechanics represents the 'wall' of the rendering engine. The wave function is the way to describe God's choice overall.

Ecclesiastes 3:11 ("He has made everything beautiful in its time. He has also set eternity in the human heart; yet no one can fathom what God has done from beginning to end."). God deliberately implements 'Divine Peekaboo' at the micro-level to enforce epistemic humility upon humans.

Science has faced a dead end because 'Probability' is the best it can achieve within MR. This limitation exists not because reality is inherently random, but because God is actively choosing moment by moment. God has His own hidden will regarding how every atomic potential will render into revealed reality. Science can calculate the *predictability* of these choices based on statistical habits (Render_BY), but the prediction has a hard limit because the Agent making the choice (UR) is hidden.
proof.theological_purpose: God created the MR boundary this way so that both 'comprehensibility' (via statistical patterns) and 'incomprehensibility' (via the unpredictable outcome in individual collapse of wave function) are simultaneously displayed, even at the level of Common Grace.

proof.description: When science struggles to even define objective reality under the Uncertainty Principle, it is proof that 'God's divine logic'—not merely MR-physical laws—must be the ultimate OBJECTIVE and GOAL of scientific study.
proof.einstein_refutation: Einstein was famously relentless in declaring 'God does not play dice' because he rightly saw that Quantum Mechanics alone cannot answer the ultimate question of reality. He spent his life searching for a 'hidden variable' within MR. Under UTR1, this problem is solved by shifting the ultimate goal from MR (the material laws) to UR (the Person choosing the outcome). The hidden variable isn't math; it is God's sovereign will.

implication.logic: By defining the gap as structural rather than epistemic, UTR1 makes theology immune to future scientific discoveries. Even if physics discovers new math for the quantum realm, the boundary between the Renderer and the Rendered remains ontologically fixed.

An AI (simNR) programmed to identify the quantum gap as an intentional limit set by a Sovereign UR will halt its reductionist processing at the wave function, rather than attempting to infinitely calculate a materialistic end-state that results in Many-Worlds nihilism.
